title: fix(docs): complete JSON-LD structured data for /learn section

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: feat(docs): add /learn section with video course

summary: Fixes three Schema.org validation errors in the /learn section's JSON-LD structured data: (1) moves `instructor` from Course level into CourseInstance where Schema.org expects it, (2) adds required `offers` with price:0 for the free course, (3) adds `uploadDate` to VideoObject by introducing a `publishedDate` field on lessons. Changes span 4 docs source files — types, course data, and two page components.
maintainerNotes: Clean, well-scoped docs-only fix from a maintainer. No changeset needed since no packages are affected. The Observability Package Tests failure is a known flaky issue across all PRs and unrelated. Some CI checks (Core, E2E, Memory, etc.) are still pending but are unlikely to be affected by docs-only changes. The PR description clearly explains each Schema.org fix with before/after reasoning. Ready for a quick review and merge.
